form.formComment: Last start raced on the pace when 3rd of 7 at this track Mdn-Sw on April 3 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Mr Crafty with 59.5kg at $1.85. The run before that raced on speed throughout when 2nd of 11 at Echuca Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1209m, 0.8 len behind Western Lane with 59.5kg at $15. Rates highly. Knocking on the door and gets every hope here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Last start raced on the pace when 3rd of 7 at this track Mdn-Sw on April 3 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Mr Crafty with 59.5kg at $1.85. The run before that raced on speed throughout when 2nd of 11 at Echuca Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1209m, 0.8 len behind Western Lane with 59.5kg at $15. Rates highly. Knocking on the door and gets every hope here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 700m bumped with Galaxys Edge.
Laid in under pressure from the 400m until passing the 250m.
Began awkwardly. Raced four wide without cover.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of four months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign sixth of 13 at Wangaratta Mdn-Sw December 6 over 1590m, 8 len behind Waco Kid carrying 59.5kg at $31. When resuming last campaign fifth of 10 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw September 19 over 1200m, 8 len behind Enamorada with 59.5kg at $21. Minor hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Gelding back from a spell of four months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign sixth of 13 at Wangaratta Mdn-Sw December 6 over 1590m, 8 len behind Waco Kid carrying 59.5kg at $31. When resuming last campaign fifth of 10 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw September 19 over 1200m, 8 len behind Enamorada with 59.5kg at $21. Minor hope.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding (Doubtland - Cherief's Choice). Robbie Griffiths has him ready for this with eight recent trials leading in today's debut. Won his most recent trial at Caulfield Heath over 1000m on March 26. Can win this first time of asking.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old gelding (Doubtland - Cherief's Choice). Robbie Griffiths has him ready for this with eight recent trials leading in today's debut. Won his most recent trial at Caulfield Heath over 1000m on March 26. Can win this first time of asking.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 14 at Echuca Mdn-Sw on October 20 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Vangogh Bankcheque with 57kg at $10. Returned from break raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 8 at Sale Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1100m, slow going 3.5 len behind Alleviate carrying 59kg at $19. Back in good shape and can sneak into the finish again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Third race start. Back in good shape and can sneak into the finish again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped inwards and taken Frosted In Time inwards.

form.formComment: At the latest run second last in a small field at this track Mdn-Sw on April 3 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Written Story carrying 57.5kg at $151. Before that 9th of 11 at Caulfield Heath Mdn-Sw on March 18 over 1200m, 6 len behind Ten Warriors with 57.5kg at $201. Will struggle again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming set the pace for much of the race 3rd of 12 at Pakenham 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 12 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Bel Lupa carrying 53kg at $6. Second run from a spell ran last in a small field at Yarra Valley 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1200m, slow going 13 len behind Our Yonglee with 57kg at $7. Can do better this time.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Third-up today and placed third-up previously. form.formComment: Jumped at a huge quote at debut, 9th of 11 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 15 over 1000m, 7 len behind Heidi Dancer carrying 57kg at $91. See this one as well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Jumped at a huge quote at debut, 9th of 11 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 15 over 1000m, 7 len behind Heidi Dancer carrying 57kg at $91. See this one as well.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign second of 9 at Warrnambool 3yo Mdn-Sw October 30 over 1400m, 2 len behind La Reine carrying 56kg at $3.90. On debut fourth of 10 at Tatura 3yo Mdn-Sw September 8 over 1100m, 3 len behind Educated carrying 56kg at $9.50. Should take plenty of catching.
